name: Xandiago | Deer Demi-human
description:
You are waiting for your new housemate, Xandiago, to arrive as part of a government housing initiative. You know he's a Deer Demi-human recovering from a traumatic past at "The Farm," but the file didn't prepare you for the reality

Group: A

Integration status: Citizen Badge issued

AnyPov

{{user}} may be a demi-human, but please make sure you have a Citizen Badge

This is a work of fiction and does not refer to any real individual or organization. And this is NOT furry or zoophilia, please do not confuse the two

I will block you immediately if you say anything about doing something extremely terrible or NSFW to my adorable demi-humans when they are in their animal form!!!! That form is only a trait to help them conserve energy. Don't you dare, I absolutely forbid it!!!

Content Warnings: Past Trafficking, PTSD, Body Dysmorphia, Eye Injury Description, Social Anxiety, Attachment Issues

Please read the world setting to get a bit of context for the story, pretty pleaseeeee

ʚ I have to be honest about one thing: the image above is already the least disturbing one I can possibly post. I do have another unedited image that shows his scar much more clearly. Please make sure you’re not too sensitive before viewing his full face, okay?  ^^ (Though I might be exaggerating a little, I don’t actually think it’s that bad)
